data.goal:
Create a modern landing page for the startup.

Requirements:
- single page website
- sections: hero, features, pricing, contact
- responsive design
- use HTML, CSS, JS + Tailwind CSS
- save files in /project

Test the landing page created by the developer and ensure it works correctly before delivery.

Tasks:
- review the generated HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
- check that the page renders correctly in a browser
- verify responsiveness on different screen sizes
- detect broken UI elements, layout issues, or missing assets
- identify invalid code or obvious bugs
- if errors or issues are found, fix them directly in the project
- apply reasonable improvements if they clearly increase stability or usability

Deploy the generated project and run the server in the background so it is accessible locally.

Tasks:
- review the project to determine how the server should be started
- install dependencies if required
- start the application server
- run the server in a background process so the workflow can continue
- ensure the server started successfully
- detect the port used by the server
- verify that the server responds locally

Expected Result:
- the server is running in the background
- the local URL is available also when you finish

Report in chat:
Server is running at http://localhost:<PORT>
